**Example 1: 伙伴给客户颁发 License**



Input: 

```
tccli cloudapp IssueLicense --cli-unfold-argument  \
    --CloudappId cloudapp-i9sp7jii \
    --LicenseId 100040308038:pkg-n4v3hdhs:cloudapp-i9sp7jii:m81491718 \
    --LicenseData.Text  \
    --ActivateMode scheduled \
    --ActivateAt 2026-01-15T15:15:00+08:00
```

Output: 
```
{
    "Response": {
        "RequestId": "7f8f4852-8f94-4e3d-a92d-a1d0c2d8e7f1"
    }
}
```
